topic.title: TA Office Hours
topic.text:
Hi everyone!
Welcome to INFO 7375 ST: Branding and AI. I am Arundhati and I’ll be your Teaching Assistant for this course this semester.
Feel free to drop by my office hours for any questions related to the course, assignments, or concepts, and we can work through them together.
Schedule:
Monday: 2PM - 4PM ET (11AM - 1PM PT)
Friday: 2PM - 4PM ET (11AM - 1PM PT)
---

Join Zoom Meeting
https://northeastern.zoom.us/j/96297896233?pwd=bR7FDfFWAa2VCzpudAKYbmQCwNbP8L.1

Meeting ID: 962 9789 6233
Passcode: 306914

---

If you are unable to attend office hours, you can reach out to me on Teams or via email, and I’ll get back to you as soon as I can.
Best of luck this semester!
Regards,
Arundhati Bandopadhyaya
Teaching Assistant, INFO 7375
Email: bandopadhyaya.a@northeastern.edu
